hudglassescc.item.hud_glasses.tooltip: Hold in hand and right-click a HUD Modem to bind these glasses to it. Whoever wears them (Glasses slot or helmet) sees that modem's HUD.
hudglassescc.config.client.title: CC: HUD Glasses — Client
hudglassescc.config.hudEnabled.tooltip: Whether the HUD overlay is rendered. Also toggled with the keybind.
hudglassescc.config.textShadow.tooltip: Shadow/outline behind HUD text. NONE / SHADOW / OUTLINE (experimental).
hudglassescc.config.hudFit.tooltip: FIT keeps aspect ratio, STRETCH fills the screen, COVER crops to cover it.
hudglassescc.config.hudWidth.tooltip: HUD grid width in characters. Fewer cells = bigger text.
